name: chorus-review
description: Multi-advisor project-state review for Claude Code, packaged as a composable suite (chorus-core substrate + chorus-review round + chorus-sdlc lifecycle). Nine persona advisors (Evans, Richards, Cooper, Norman, Uncle Bob, Beck, Delivery-and-Ops, Security-and-Trust, Goldratt) plus an optional Guido Python lens run a structured, RSVP-gated review through their lenses; conflicts go to advisor(); output is a durable markdown artifact you commit.
